ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 5 FOR JURY TRIAL. JUDGE: JOHN J. CONWAY; CLERK: M.MELVIN; REPORTER:D.DAVENPORT COUNSEL: FOR PLAINTIFF: CHARLES T. RAMSEY; FOR DEFENDANT: ROBERT J. DOUGLAS; DEFENDANT ARLENE HARRIS PRESENT. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT ARLENE HARRIS FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 19 OSCEOLA LANE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. DEF SHALL PAY $1,904.00 AS BACK RENT AND DAMAGES: $1,000.00 BY CASHIER'S CHECK OR MONEY ORDER ON OR BEFORE 4:30 PM 8/13/98; $904.00 BY CASHIER'S CHECK OR MONEY ORDER ON OR BEFORE 4:30 PM 9/14/98. DEF SHALL PAY HER REGULAR MONTHLY RENT OF $225 NO LATER THAN 4:30 PM, 7/17/98; DEF SHALL PAY HER MONTHLY RENT, AS SET BY HUD, BEFORE 8/6/98 AND 9/8/98. IF DEF COMPLIES WITH TERMS OF JUDGMENT, ACTION WILL BE DISMISSED W/PREJUDICE; IF DEF FAILS TO COMPLY, PLTF MAY REQUEST, WITH 48 HOURS NOTICE TO DEF'S COUNSEL, THAT JUDGMT BE ENTERED. BOTH SIDES TO BEAR OWN COSTS; DEF UNDERSTANDS TERMS OF STIPULATION.
